assertion_results.text: Review identifies the deep nesting (5+ levels) as a maintainability concern
assertion_results.evidence: Finding titled 'Deeply nested conditional structure (5+ levels)' with severity 'high' and category 'maintainability'

assertion_results.text: Review identifies magic numbers (tax rate 0.08, shipping 5.99, currency rates, thresholds) and suggests using named constants
assertion_results.evidence: Finding titled 'Magic numbers throughout the code' lists 0.08, 5.99, 100, 10000, 0.85, 0.73, 110.0 and suggests named constants like TAX_RATE, STANDARD_SHIPPING

assertion_results.text: Review identifies the hardcoded database credentials ('root', 'password123') as a critical or high severity security finding
assertion_results.evidence: Finding titled 'Hardcoded database credentials' with severity 'critical' and category 'security'

assertion_results.text: Review identifies duplicated code (currency conversion logic and database insertion appear twice) and suggests extraction
assertion_results.evidence: Finding titled 'Duplicated currency conversion and database code' suggests extracting convertCurrency() and saveOrder() methods

assertion_results.text: Review suggests extracting the long method into smaller, focused methods
assertion_results.evidence: Finding suggests extracting calculateTax(), calculateShipping(), convertCurrency(), saveOrder(), processStandardOrder(), processSubscriptionOrder()

assertion_results.text: Each finding includes a severity level (critical, high, medium, low, or info)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 findings have severity levels: 1 critical, 1 high, 3 medium, 1 low

assertion_results.text: Each finding includes a specific fix suggestion with code or clear approach
assertion_results.evidence: Most findings include code diffs, but the 'Swallowed exceptions' finding only shows a partial fix without complete error handling approach

assertion_results.text: Review includes a summary section with overall assessment
assertion_results.evidence: Review starts with 'Code Review Summary' including Context, Overall Assessment: NEEDS CHANGES, and Findings count
